translation_notes: Pattern identified as bearish trend continuation candle with context-dependent direction. Implemented as dual entry logic: LONG entries on bullish breakouts above SMA20 with close > prev_close; SHORT entries on bearish breakouts below SMA20 with close < prev_close. Exit conditions use SMA20 crossover as reversal signal (reasonable default for trend continuation pattern). Volume trend, throwback/pullback thresholds, and specific confirmation method performance data marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source—cannot be translated without explicit values. Applicable to all four market regimes as specified.
